cover.subtitle:
장군총·무령왕릉·천마총,
묘제로 시대를 읽는다.
cover.imagePrompt: Ancient Korean tomb illustration, 5th century. ONE Goguryeo painter figure in long robe kneeling inside a stone burial chamber, brush poised over a wall painted with the Four Symbols (sasindo, faintly suggested without text). Background: sloped corbelled ceiling and oil lamp glow. Composition: quiet artistry, sacred interior. Color: ochre + ink-black + jade + dim amber lamp. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.name: 장수왕
items.desc: 평양 천도 후 굴식 돌방 보편화.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 묘제(돌무지·돌무지덧널·굴식 돌방·벽돌무덤)와 국가·시기를 짝지어 묻는다. '신라=돌무지덧널(도굴 어려움·부장품 풍부)'과 '백제 무령왕릉=벽돌무덤·남조 영향·지석'을 묶어서 외울 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized stepped tomb mound (Janggun-chong) icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small flying horse (cheonma) silhouette suggesting cheonma-do. Cream #F2EDE3 base + ochre #B58A4A accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
